starter_assumption: Two-course erhu-style stringing with inner and outer courses
allowed_claim: Packet may plan two bowed strings only
required_source_evidence: Product ID gauge/material packaging photo or supplier spec
validation_method: Tune and bow at measured qianjin-to-bridge span

starter_assumption: Outer course is paired with inner course for response testing
allowed_claim: No tension or pitch recommendation until source is recorded
required_source_evidence: Product ID gauge/material packaging photo or supplier spec
validation_method: Tune and bow at measured qianjin-to-bridge span

starter_assumption: Starter 380-420 mm setup range may be tested with selected strings
allowed_claim: Range is a prototype window not a final erhu scale
required_source_evidence: Installed length photo plus tuner/audio capture
validation_method: Compare response at measured span and document one variable change

starter_assumption: String tension is unknown before installed testing
allowed_claim: Do not publish tension values from violin-family assumptions
required_source_evidence: String material/gauge plus measured pitch and observed feel

starter_assumption: String source may be traditional erhu set or prototype substitute
allowed_claim: Substitute is allowed only when labeled as prototype
required_source_evidence: Reason for substitute source and compatibility notes
validation_method: Record response and failure/fit notes before recommendation
